inputs.label: Availability (%)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of actual production time to planned production time, expressed as a percentage. Higher availability indicates less downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of actual production time to planned production time, expressed as a percentage. Higher availability indicates less downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiili üretim süresinin planlanan üretim süresine oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir. Yüksek kullanılabilirlik daha az duruş süresini gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis von tatsächlicher Produktionszeit zu geplanter Produktionszeit, ausgedrückt in Prozent. Höhere Verfügbarkeit bedeutet weniger Stillstand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport entre le temps de production réel et le temps de production prévu, exprimé en pourcentage. Une disponibilité plus élevée indique moins de temps d'arrêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre el tiempo de producción real y el tiempo de producción planificado, expresada como porcentaje. Una mayor disponibilidad indica menos tiempo de inactividad.

inputs.label: Performance (%)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of actual output to theoretical maximum output during actual production time, expressed as a percentage. Accounts for speed losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of actual output to theoretical maximum output during actual production time, expressed as a percentage. Accounts for speed losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiili üretim süresinde fiili çıktının teorik maksimum çıktıya oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir. Hız kayıplarını hesaba katar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis von tatsächlichem Output zu theoretischem Maximaloutput während der tatsächlichen Produktionszeit, ausgedrückt in Prozent. Berücksichtigt Geschwindigkeitsverluste.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport entre la production réelle et la production maximale théorique pendant le temps de production réel, exprimé en pourcentage. Tient compte des pertes de vitesse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre la producción real y la producción máxima teórica durante el tiempo de producción real, expresada como porcentaje. Contabiliza las pérdidas de velocidad.

inputs.label: Quality (%)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of good units produced to total units started, expressed as a percentage. Reflects defect rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of good units produced to total units started, expressed as a percentage. Reflects defect rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretilen iyi ürünlerin başlatılan toplam ürüne oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir. Hata oranını yansıtır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis von produzierten guten Einheiten zu gestarteten Einheiten, ausgedrückt in Prozent. Spiegelt die Ausschussrate wider.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport entre les unités bonnes produites et le total des unités lancées, exprimé en pourcentage. Reflète le taux de défauts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre las unidades buenas producidas y el total de unidades iniciadas, expresada como porcentaje. Refleja la tasa de defectos.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
